seoTitle: Costello vs Cox Peninsula — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Costello and Cox Peninsula. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Costello vs Cox Peninsula: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Costello and Cox Peninsula.
heading: Costello vs Cox Peninsula — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Costello, Northern Territory and Cox Peninsula, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Costello has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Cox Peninsula (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Costello or Cox Peninsula safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Costello has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Cox Peninsula scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Costello scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Cox Peninsula scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Costello or Cox Peninsula?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Costello has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
